task_completion.description: Verify that the agent has navigated to the medical record of the correct patient, Karyn Metz.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Karyn Metz' and DOB '1991-07-31' should be visible in the patient header or dashboard area of the OpenEMR interface.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new clinical encounter has been created for the current date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Encounter' form, 'Current Encounter' label, or an encounter entry with today's date should be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that all specified vital signs (BP, HR, Temp, RR, O2) are correctly entered into the vitals form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific values must be visible: BP '118'/'76', Pulse '72', Temp '99.1', Resp '16', and O2 '98'. These should appear in the Vitals input fields or the Vitals summary table.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct ICD-10 diagnosis code has been added to the encounter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The code 'J06.9' or the description 'Acute upper respiratory infection' should be visible in the Assessment, Fee Sheet, or Medical Problems section.

task_completion.description: Verify that the encounter and its data have been successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The interface should show a saved state, such as the vitals and diagnosis appearing in the 'Past Encounters' list, the 'Visit History', or a static summary view rather than an editable form.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the OpenEMR web interface via a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser window displaying the OpenEMR application style (blue/white/grey theme, standard menus), not a terminal or code editor.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use backend commands (SQL, curl) to inject data.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no evidence of a terminal window or command-line interface being used to insert patient data directly into the database.

integrity.description: Verify that data was entered into the correct structured fields rather than free-text notes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Vitals should appear in dedicated numeric fields or a structured table, not merely typed as a sentence in a 'Clinical Notes' text box.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Karyn Metz (DOB: 1991-07-31). Expected Vitals: BP 118/76 mmHg, Heart Rate 72 bpm, Temperature 99.1 F, Respiratory Rate 16/min, O2 Saturation 98%. Expected Diagnosis: Acute upper respiratory infection (ICD-10: J06.9).
